job: Asphalt shingle roof replacement (typical single-family, mid-size)
source: Fixr.com: professional asphalt shingle roof replacement runs $8,000–$16,000 (national average ~$12,000). DIY material-only cost for an average-size roof typically runs $2,000–$6,000 per RoofMaxx's DIY roofing guide — not recommended without roofing experience; falls and structural mistakes are the main risks.
regionNote: U.S. national ballpark; coastal, mountain, and metro markets often run higher. Steep pitch, layers, and tear-off drive variance.
